title: Reyno Valley
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Reyno Valley''' was a valley on [[Brosi]], to the east of [[West Reyno River]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

Reyno Valley was in the influence area of the [[Brosin Underground]] around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]. The largest team of the Brosin Underground, personally led by [[Vuraj Marn]], operated both in Reyno Valley and [[Nihun Valley]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
